column8: MSVC CRT _strnlen stub in orig binary; port links MinGW CRT which provides its own strnlen — no port-side source equivalent
MSVC CRT __isctype stub (calls __crtGetStringTypeA) in orig binary; port uses MinGW CRT equivalent
MSVC CRT _dosmaperr stub mapping DOS error codes to errno via DAT_0047d8f8 table; port uses MinGW CRT
MSVC CRT _errno stub — returns &_getptd()->_terrno; port uses MinGW CRT errno
MSVC CRT __doserrno stub — returns &_getptd()->_tdoserrno; port uses MinGW CRT
